description:
Build with virtual parts, render designs and create instructions.

Studio is an all-in-one desktop app for Windows and Mac that lets you build with virtual parts, render designs and create instructions.

What can I do with Studio?
Build
You can build your own virtual creations! Start a project from scratch, import a saved LEGO® Digital Designer file, upload a picture to make a mosaic, or just use your imagination and see what happens when you put the pieces together.
Test a design
By testing your design, you can find out if it can be built with real LEGO bricks.
Create or browse instructions
Use Instruction Maker to create step-by-step instructions for your designs
Render designs
Generate photorealistic images and short videos of your designs
Share on the Studio Gallery
Upload your designs on My Studio and publish them on Studio Gallery
Use the BrickLink catalog
Check if the parts in your design are available and how much they cost.
2x2 Brick Cube in viewport can be used for easy camera navigation and orientation
Updated some copy related to merging accounts.
Update to avatar to use Bricklink account avatar instead of LEGO account avatar.
Brick outline would not move with bricks if connect tool was used on a split brick.
When using multi-connect option, rotation on the parts after the connect would not be set to 0.
Some part types were causing initialization failures when using Instruciton maker.
Some parts were losing decals when rendering in POV-Ray.
Some part types had internal ridges showing on page design and Instruction exports.
If tab was used to resize the building palette, you couldn't manually resize it with the mouse.
Build mode would not initialize if "no" was selected during patch update prompt.
Added 84 parts.
Added 153 Torsos.
Updated 3d models for 27 parts.
Part 89680 was not copying and mirroring correctly.
